lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: First day in school in a long time. Better start off on a the right foot..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Lets see what the guys are up to.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: when youre ready to start your school day sit at your table: second row, second column

menu_entry.text: |School days take up most of the day. Make sure to do everything you needed to do before going to school.|
I hate this place. School is like prison just less criminals and more insecure and power-hungry teachers. Especially Miss Carter.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Please sit down at your desks.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter, the history teacher, a well mannered but just as strict teacher

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Better not stand out too much

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Anybody willing to take the hit and volunteer for the oral exam?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: everybody acts like theyre didnt hear her

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: You know, its not that hard to study and come prepared people!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: If you applied yourself at home, you wouldnt have to be sweating right now..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, if nobody want to be the tribute today. Im afraid Ill have to chose one of you myself..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: It doesnt bring me any satisfaction to do this, but you left me no choice.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: theres nothing for you to do here now. School is over
